zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Wentworth於1453年4月出生時，她的父親Henry Wentworth27歲，母親Elizabeth Howard24歲。她和William Waldegrave至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1540年5月6日在英國素福爾可布勒斯享年87歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Wentworth was born in April 1453, her father, Henry Wentworth, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Howard, was 24. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with William Waldegrave. She died on 6 May 1540, in Bures, Suffolk, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Bures, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Wentworth est née en avril 1453, son père, Henry Wentworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Howard, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec William Waldegrave. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1540, à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Bures, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Wentworth im April 1453 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Wentworth 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Howard 24. Sie hatte mit William Waldegrave mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1540 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Bures, Suffolk, England und wurde in Bures, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con William Waldegrave. Morì il 6 maggio 1540, nel Bures, Suffolk, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Bures, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Wentworthが1453年4月に生まれた時，父Henry Wentworthは27歳，母Elizabeth Howardは24歳であった。彼女はWilliam Waldegraveとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1540年5月6日にイギリススフォルクブレスで87歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレスにて埋葬された。

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Wentworth(이)가 1453년 4월에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Wentworth(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Howard(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 William Waldegrave(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 5월 6일 영국 수폴크 버스에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Wentworth родилась апрель 1453 г., её отцу по имени Henry Wentworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Howard, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от William Waldegrave. Она умерла 6 мая 1540 г. в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности буресь, суффолк, Англия.
